title: Tenure tour + sales sheet shipped — pre-MVP collateral live
summary: Two new artifacts under /tenure/ to support the Q3 design-partner conversations Vector and Cadence open this week. Tour at /tenure/tour/: single-scrolling six-scene walkthrough following one synthetic employee (Maria Chen, June 2 start) through pre-board, Day 0, Day 7, Day 90 internal transfer, three-year anniversary, and voluntary departure. Each scene shows the agent acting (Threshold, Lattice, or Ember), the decision-class boundary, the human-signs moment, and a realistic Console-style mockup with synthetic data, timestamps, and audit-log entries. Prominent 'Preview · Not yet generally available · Available to design partners 2026-Q3' banner on every screen — no deceit. Sales sheet at /tenure/sales-sheet/: one-page summary for CHRO + COO + CIO handoff, print-friendly (Letter @page rules, color-safe in ink). Problem, three agents, decision-class table, pricing table, compliance posture (I-9/E-Verify, EU AI Act Annex III, GDPR/CCPA, SOC 2), launch design partners (Mercator, Halcyon, Northwind), design-partner CTA. Both linked from the /tenure/ hero CTA row (Take the tour · Sales sheet · Become a design partner). Build verified: 200 on both URLs, baseurl-prefix correct in production output, link audit clean.
